title: The New Corporation: The Unfortunately Necessary Sequel
original_title: The New Corporation: The Unfortunately Necessary Sequel
overview: Two decades after the initial exposé of the corporation, this follow-up unveils a world now fully remade in its image and perilously close to fascism.
